title: Avoid wildcard imports (import.*)
description: Wildcard imports (e.g. import java.util.*) pull in every class from a package, causing namespace pollution, potential name clashes, and making it unclear which types the class actually depends on. Explicit imports document intent and prevent accidental use of unintended classes.
example: Instead of: import java.util.*; Use: import java.util.List; import java.util.ArrayList;
reference: Google Java Style Guide, Checkstyle import.avoidStar rule
